originalTitle: First Google, now Meta? Big Tech may increasingly sell stock to bankroll $820 billion AI boom.
summary: Stock investors may not love it — but bond investors already heavily engaged in funding the AI buildout are pleased.
content: Stock investors may not love it — but bond investors already heavily engaged in funding the AI buildout are pleased.
chineseTitle: 先是谷歌，现在是 Meta？大型科技公司可能会越来越多地出售股票，为 8200 亿美元的 AI 繁荣提供资金。
chineseSummary: 股票投资者可能不喜欢它，但已经大力参与人工智能建设的债券投资者却很高兴。
chineseContent: 股票投资者可能不喜欢它，但已经大力参与人工智能建设的债券投资者却很高兴。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
